feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG Certificate
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm taking the Learning Journey for SAP MDG (MDG100 and MDG200). I have no background in SAP MDG except for Material Master Data. I took the test and failed.

My question is, are there additional resources out there, besides the virtual classroom, that can help me with the test and better understand the content? Any studying tips? Videos that are according to SAP teaching would help me a lot. I appreciate any help you can provide.

entry.title: Major bug in SAP. We do not need SP Key rather we should have source plant and destination field
entry.content: Currently SP Key field in MRP 2 in MM03 is created unnecessarily since we do not have any field called source plant and destination plant in S4 Hana. There are lot of problems for creation of SP key which is unique to company based on source plant and destination plant. For every new plant transfer, new SP key needs to be created and maintained. SAP has created this problem. Instead for every material, source plant and destination plant fields should have been given in MRP 2 view in MM03.

entry.title: SAP S4 : customer master main address in Japanese or Chinese / Compare to English
entry.content:
Hi , We have Sales Org's all over the world , and operate in one instance of SAP . In SAP S/4 , should the customer master main address be in Japanese or Chinese / Compare to Latin characters set ?  Or the other way around ?

Example : Sales Org's JP01 - Japan and CN01 - China , interact with the local customers and vendor in the local language .

The main usage of Latin characters to be set for all customer is to perform a SAP GTS check and some corporate reporting so we understand the customer / vendor  name .

Any OSS note or guidance will be welcome as we want to leverage SAP S4 . Thank you

entry.title: MDG Mass Processing Address Usage Error
entry.content:
Hi,

We are upgrading our MDG system version to S/4 HANA 2023 and we've encountered a problem during the mass processing of Business Partner.

We have understood that the entity BP_ADDUSG has been replaced by BP_ADUSTD in the data model. Currently, both entities are active in our system. In the UI, the new entity BP_ADUSTD is correctly populated and displayed.

However, when we import data using the Excel file in a consolidation/mass process scenario, the system still writes data to the old entity BP_ADDUSG. As a result, after the Change Request is created, we do not see the data in the expected section, and we encounter an error due to the absence of the required data.

Additionally, we receive a warning message indicating that an obsolete method is being called, likely triggered after the data is written to BP_ADDUSG.

Our main question is:
How can we ensure that the data is written to the correct entity, BP_ADUSTD?
Is there a specific mapping or customizing setting that allows us to control this behavior?

Even when values are not explicitly provided in the input file, the system continues to derive and populate the old entity as it did prior to the upgrade. We suspect this behavior may be linked to the mass processing logic or data import framework (Excel/Web Service), which might still reference the old entity.

Any guidance or documentation you can provide to help us correctly redirect the data to BP_ADUSTD would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: Update customer hierarchy if change in rebate or price relevance
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

Update customer hierarchy if change in rebate or price relevance in SAP tcode XD02.

Anybody familiar with this error.

Thanks,

newcloudguy

entry.title: deleted custom configuration from component FPM_FORM_UIBB_GL2 but it remains in WDY_CONF_USER table
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I've created a custom configuration YMDG_IN_SUP_TAXFLDS to make custom fields visible on the NWBC UIBB using the customizing option. Later, I deleted the configuration ID from the component FPM_FORM_UIBB_GL2 but it remains in WDY_CONF_USER/ WDY_CONF_USERT/WDY_CONF_USERT2 tables which resulting dumps when accessing NWBC as the system is trying to access the feeder class associated to the custom configuration. 


Checked the configurations using the program /BOFU/R_WD_COMP_CONF_WUL but couldn't find the custom configuration which means it doesn't exists.
I've tried clearing the cache using program /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES, WDR_CFG_ADJUST_CONFIG_DATA.
Data Model cache cleared using /n/iwfnd/cache_cleanup. I've explored the below notes as well, but no use

1538629 - Report for deleting personalizations in cProjects
2574964 - Replication of Web Dynpro User Interface Customizing from Client 000 to Destination Client - SAP for Me

https://me.sap.com/notes/2877675/E

Can I delete the table entries manually, or do we have any alternative to adjust this?

Appreciate your inputs, Thank you 🙂

entry.title: MDG Filter Search Help of Characteristic Value
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP MDG on an S/4 HANA 2023 system, is it possible to filter the search help of a characteristic in "Lean Classification" management?

For example, if in the list of characteristics there is MDM_MOTHER_CODE with a specific value, I need to filter the values for the characteristic MDM_DM_CALIBRO based on the value of the MDM_MOTHER_CODE.

Where do I need to make changes?

Thank you

entry.title: Change of feeder class name in SAP MDG for BP
entry.content:
HI Experts,

I have a small doubt as below and suggest me the same. Thanks.

1. We have a custom uibb where we kept the custom feeder class

2. For checking standard behaviour, we replaced the custom feeder class to standard feeder class

3. Again, we changed the standard feeder class to custom feeder class

post that , New button was not working. When we click on the NEW button system hangs .

I checked the feeder class parameters/setting.

Is there any other settings do i need to carry?

Kindly suggest me the same. thanks.

entry.title: How to Read Data In Mass Process/Consolidation Using Validation BADI MDG
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We got a simple requirement to read company code is initial or not based on Customer roles (FLCU00) , For Single Process its working as expected using IT_DATA ( Reading roles) and using READ_CHAR_VALUE ( Read Company Code exist or not)

But for Mass Process we are unable to fetch Company code using READ_CHAR_VALUE  during validation step of Consolidation.

Any solution?

entry.title: Mass Maintenance Product: No process template for process goal
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Im facing this problem where I want to use the Mass maintenance for products (system private cloud). Customer has no MDG but as im aware of this Fiori app (MDC) is usable without MDG in scope. 

 

I did all configuration but can not find the process goal Basic Mass Update. I activated the predefined Process Template SAP_MM_MAS 

How can I solve this and make the app work? Anyone some tips? Thanks in advance!

 

KR Josef

entry.title: Can we do value mapping through MDG Consolidation ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are doing vendor initial load through MDG consolidation from ECC source system to MDG Hub on S/4 HANA target system. Here the vendor account groups are changing in the target system (example: from ACGRP1 to ACGRP2)

Can anyone tell me if we can do this value mapping for a vendor from ACGRP1(ECC) to ACGRP2(S/4) while doing dataload through Consolidation process in MDG? 

Thanks in advance!! T

entry.title: Change pointer for CLFMAS and BATMAS
entry.content:
I need to trigger automatically the idoc from ecc to s4 EMW decentralized when a batch is changed. The change pointers are activated for CLFMAS, BATMAS ma no idoc is triggered automatically when a batch is change in ECC.

What do i miss?

entry.title: SAP MDG costing for co-deployment
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Can someone break it down for me, I am a little lost whether the records which are not governed via MDG but exists in Active tables would still be counted towards my SAP MDG licensed records or not, in case the SAP MDG is co-deployed with S/4 HANA.

Thanks!

entry.title: Can we create Key Mappings for multiple systems in MDG Consolidation?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can anyone tell me if we can create Key Mappings for multiple source systems while doing dataload via MDG Consolidation? The reason why I am asking this, because I do not see any option to put multiple source system names in the Consolidation UI. There is only one source system's name that we can put.

Your valuable advice is greatly appreciated.

Thanks!! T

entry.title: How to assign roles to Consolidation steps ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can anyone help me have the answers of the following questions?

1) We assign roles to the Central Governance through Decision tables or Dyn Agent Det badi. Is there any similar way we can assign roles to the process template steps in Consolidation and Mass Processing?

2) Also I have a requirement to hide specific process template steps for specific roles . How would we achieve it?

Any help would be much appreciated.

Thanks, T

entry.title: Creating a Supplier Hierarchy ?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We implementing MDG on S/4 HANA, where we need to create Hierarchies for Supplier master data. As per my little understanding, I think first we need to create the hierarchies in MDG and then the task of assigning suppliers or business partners to the hierarchies will come. Should we be creating those hierarchies at BP level or supplier level. 

Can any one of you tell me or guide me as to how we should create this hierarchy for supplier. I can see a lot of CR Types available from standard.

1) which CR types to use from the following. My assumption says either BPHP1  or BPHP2 to be used. I could be wrong too.

                    BP1P2                  Create Bus. Partner w. Hry. Assignment

                    BPHP1                  Process Business Partner Hierarchies 

                    BPHP2                  Process Business Partner Hierarchies

                    SUPPL1P2           Create Supplier w. Hierarchy Assignment

2) Since we are doing this in MDG on S/4 HANA, should we create hierarchies at BP level or supplier level?  

Thanks, T

entry.title: can i write custom entity with Governance API?
entry.content: i want to write values in custom Entity when data comes from SOA Inbound for Supplier at Company code level.is it possible to write custom entity using Governance API ?

entry.title: MDG CBA Object Component Configuration xxx does not exist
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We tried to hide fields dynamically according to CR type with CBA instead of coding.

First we had problem of missing fields in UIBB. Even field set as visible in component configuration page, when we opened the CR, field doesn't show up on screen.

  • Tried to delete adaptation and create again but couldn't get any solution.
  • Even deleted all adaptations in order to use base configuration but still field is missing.
  • Checked BaDI's that might effect field properties but there aren't any referencing point.
  • Checked and deleted all personalizations.
  • Also clearing UI metadata didn't help.

I figured out that deleted adaptations still take place in system via SE84->Web Dynpro->Component Configurations. I deleted unnecessary configurations via right click and delete by hoping missing fields will return. Then our problem problem continued to increase. We faced an error as Object Component Configuration xxx does not exist.

With this error i can't select, change, add or delete adaptations. Tried to re-create error referencing number of Component Configuration but of course it didn't help 🙂  So the page has become unusable, can't click anywhere anymore.

If a similar situation has happened to you or if there is a direction that you think can contribute to the solution, I would be very pleased.

entry.title: Enhanement on BP REL Handler class : MDG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For one of our requirement, we need to filter the relationship category and observed that when we open the customer in MDG UI, it lookup on class CL_MDG_BS_BP_HANDLER and method QUERY_BP_REL.

Observed that there is a select query inside this method manipulates it.

Checked few of the SAP NOTES and observed there is no filteration in terms of fetching entry for relationship.

Hope, we can do the implicit enhancement for this guy to do the filteration.

NOTE: We dont want to do the filteration post select query

Kindly suggest the same. Thanks

Block : uibb : relationship

entry.title: Update work center with new activity type using different UoM - MTN vs L
entry.content:
Greetings of the day PP Experts,

Requesting to share your expertise to understand, when we change/add new Activity type to an existing work center with different Unit of Measure (UoM) and also please help me to understand how it impacts the routing and other dependent workflow like any exiting planned or prod orders.

Actual scenario is there is a work center (Ex: ABC1122) which is being utilized with only 1 activity (Ex: ABC111) with UoM as MTN (Metric Ton). Now, the requirement is changing the Activity type (Ex: ABC121) with UoM as L (Liters) this with effective 3rd Quater (let say from June month) and stop using the current activity type (Ex: ABC111).    

Here, I want to understand if I make changes in work center by adding new activity type (EX: ABC121) with different UoM (liters).  Is there any impact on exiting routing & Planned /prod Orders? 

I recommended to set up a new work center with new activity type and use it effective June. However, my client is requirement to use the same work center and requesting to change the activity type. 

I have traced out there are 6 routing currently using this work center (ABC1122) with t-cde: CA80. when I try to add activity type with UOM as L in work center. I am getting below error at routing level "Enter a unit for dimension Mass for the standard value XXXXXX". 

Prior to posting here I have gone a few blogs and similar scenarios in our SAP Community however I didn't find the relevant one. 

Requesting the PP experts to share your inputs on the impact if we use the same work center by changing the Activity type.
